UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Custom metadata and profile details for registered users.

email.description: Email address of the authenticated user.

username.description: A unique custom bio-tech username handle.

avatarColor.description: A hexadecimal color used to style the user's avatar.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the account profile was established.

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles database matching registered Firebase Authentication accounts.
